Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}...Hey, you there. This may seem sudden, but do you want to be Santa?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Well, just between you and me... I'm THE Santa who makes kids' wishes come true on Christmas![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}...Well, you can't really tell when I'm dressed like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}I'm actually looking for someone to help me with my merry duties right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}It's a special job, but we're always short on staff... What do you say? Want to give it a try?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Great! Let's get on with it. ...But first, one question for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Can you show me proof that you've done something good for the world?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}I see... If you ever change your mind, you know where to find me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Something good I've done for the world...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I rescue someone from[n]somewhere dangerous, maybe[n]he'll acknowledge my deed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Well then, I'll be waiting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}I'm actually looking for someone to help me with my merry duties right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}It's a special job, but we're always short on staff... What do you say? Want to give it a try?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Can you show me proof that you've done something good for the world?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Hm? Is there something you want to show me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I showed the person claiming[n]to be Santa a thank-you letter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}I see... So you rescued a missing person...![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Putting yourself on the line to help others is not something everyone can do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Fantastic... You pass the test! Here, take this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Congratulations, you're now a certified Santa! Apprentices only get the hat, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}So, right off the bat, here's your first task: deliver this to someone who needs it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}This year's work is pretty much taken care of already. You can start working hard for next year.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 436}Well, I'll see you when the time comes. Merry Christmas![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I received a thank-you[n]letter from a missing person I rescued...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hm? Is there something you want to show me?[n]{f 1 1}
